h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
# F k₁ · # F j = ?b

              
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
# F k₁ = ?y'

              apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (F_fully_faithful _ _))).
            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁ · # F j = # F h · # F k₂

h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧

p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f

q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁ · # F j = ?b

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
# F j = ?t2

              apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (F_fully_faithful _ _))).
            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁ · (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂) =
# F h · # F k₂

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
# F h · # F k₂ =
i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁ · (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂)

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
# F h · # F k₂ = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
?b =
i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁ · (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂)

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
# F h · # F k₂ = ?b

              
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁

w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
# F k₂ = ?t2

              apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (F_fully_faithful _ _))).
            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
# F h · (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂) =
i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁ · (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂)

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

w₂: C₁

p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f

  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧

# F h · i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂ =
i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁ · i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃

f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

w₂: C₁

j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))

h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧

i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f

  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧

i₁' · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂ =

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
i₁' · (f · inv_from_z_iso i₂) =
i₁'
· (inv_from_z_iso i₁ · (i₁ · (f · inv_from_z_iso i₂)))

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
f · inv_from_z_iso i₂ =
inv_from_z_iso i₁ · (i₁ · (f · inv_from_z_iso i₂))

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category

G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
f · inv_from_z_iso i₂ =
inv_from_z_iso i₁ · i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))
  (i₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
w₁', w₂': C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧
i₁': z_iso (F w₁') x₁
i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧
q₁: # F k₁ · i₁ = i₁'
k₂:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₂' w₂))
  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
f · inv_from_z_iso i₂ =
identity x₁ · f · inv_from_z_iso i₂

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁: C₁
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
w₂: C₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁ w₂))

h: C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₂' ⟧

i₂': z_iso (F w₂') x₂
p: # F h · i₂' = i₁' · f
k₁:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful w₁' w₁))
  (i₁' · inv_from_z_iso i₁): C₁ ⟦ w₁', w₁ ⟧

  (i₂' · inv_from_z_iso i₂): C₁ ⟦ w₂', w₂ ⟧
q₂: # F k₂ · i₂ = i₂'
f · inv_from_z_iso i₂ = f · inv_from_z_iso i₂

            apply idpath.
      Qed.

      Definition enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor
        : enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x₁
          -->
          enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x₂
        := pr11 enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor_iscontr.

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁, w₂: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
p: # F h · i₂ = i₁ · f
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x₁ i₁
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor =
# G h · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x₂ i₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
w₁, w₂: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (F w₁) x₁
i₂: z_iso (F w₂) x₂
p: # F h · i₂ = i₁ · f
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x₁ i₁
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor =
# G h · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x₂ i₂

        exact (pr21 enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor_iscontr w₁ w₂ h i₁ i₂ p).
      Qed.

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₃ ⟦ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x₁,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x₂ ⟧
p: ∏ (w₁ w₂ : C₁) (h : C₁ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧)
(i₁ : z_iso (F w₁) x₁) 
(i₂ : z_iso (F w₂) x₂),
# F h · i₂ = i₁ · f
→ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x₁ i₁
  · g =
  # G h
  · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x₂ i₂
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor = g

→ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x₁ i₁
  · g =
  # G h
  · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x₂ i₂
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor = g

        exact (!(maponpaths
                   pr1
                   (pr2 enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor_iscontr (g ,, p)))).
      Qed.
    End OnMor.

    
V: monoidal_cat

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃

(i₁ : z_iso (F w₁) x) (i₂ : z_iso (F w₂) x),
# F h · i₂ = i₁ · identity x
→ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x i₁
  · identity

  # G h
  · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x i₂

iz: z_iso (F wz) z

iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))

· (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f

C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
# F j · iy = ix · f
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix
· (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f
   · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor g) =
# G h · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz

x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
?b = ix · f

G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁

            apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (F_fully_faithful _ _))).
          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy · iy = ix · f

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
ix · (f · (inv_from_z_iso iy · iy)) = ix · f

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
ix · (f · identity y) = ix · f

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃

f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧

ix · f = ix · f

          apply idpath.

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
# F k = ?y'

            apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (F_fully_faithful _ _))).
          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz · iz = iy · g

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
iy · (g · (inv_from_z_iso iz · iz)) = iy · g

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
iy · (g · identity z) = iy · g

f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧

h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧

iz: z_iso (F wz) z

q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
iy · g = iy · g

          apply idpath.
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧

iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix
· (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f
   · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor g) =
# G h · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz

· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor g =
# G h · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz

p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor g = ?t2

          exact (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor_eq g k iy iz r).
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
# G j
· (# G k
   · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
# G h · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz

# G j · # G k
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz =
# G h · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz

weq_from_fully_faithful F_fully_faithful wx wz (j · k) =
weq_from_fully_faithful F_fully_faithful wx wz h

wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
# F k = ?t2

          apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (F_fully_faithful _ _))).
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy
· (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz) = # F h

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy
· (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz) =
# F h · identity (F wz)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy
· (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz) =
# F h · (iz · inv_from_z_iso iz)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy · iy · g
· inv_from_z_iso iz = # F h · iz · inv_from_z_iso iz

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy · iy · g = # F h · iz

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy · iy · g = ix · (f · g)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
ix · (f · (inv_from_z_iso iy · (iy · g))) =
ix · (f · g)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
inv_from_z_iso iy · (iy · g) = g

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
inv_from_z_iso iy · iy · g = g

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
wx, wz: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ wx, wz ⟧
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
p: # F h · iz = ix · (f · g)
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: # F j · iy = ix · f
k:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy wz))
  (iy · g · inv_from_z_iso iz): C₁ ⟦ wy, wz ⟧
r: # F k · iz = iy · g
identity y · g = g

        apply id_left.
    Qed.

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

is_functor ?F

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

functor_data C₂ C₃
 exact enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_data.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
is_functor enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_data
 exact enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_laws.
    Defined.

    (** * 3. The enrichment *)
    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
∃! f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
       enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
f =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
∃! f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
       enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
f =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
H: ∃ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) x
∃! f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
       enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
f =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
(∃ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) x)
→ ∃! f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
         E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
         enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
  ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
  (iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
  f =
  precomp_arr E₂ y ix
  · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
  · inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
  · EG wx wy
  · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
            ix))
  · postcomp_arr E₃
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
(∑ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) x)
→ ∃! f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
         E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
         enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
  ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
  (iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
  f =
  precomp_arr E₂ y ix
  · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
  · inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
  · EG wx wy
  · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
            ix))
  · postcomp_arr E₃
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: ∑ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) x
∃! f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
       enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
f =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

x, y: C₂

       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
H: ∃ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) y
∃! f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,

    (inv_from_z_iso

· postcomp_arr E₃

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
∃! f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,

f =

· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
isaprop
  (∑
   f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
       enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
   ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
   (iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
   f =
   precomp_arr E₂ y ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

wy: C₁

∑
f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
    E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,

· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)

· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)

       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))

    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
isaprop
  (∑
   f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
       enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
   ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
   (iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
   f =
   precomp_arr E₂ y ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑
   f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
       enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
   ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
   (iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
   f =
   precomp_arr E₂ y ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
    E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
    enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
f =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
φ₁ = φ₂

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
φ₁: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p₁: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
φ₁ =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
φ₂: ∑
f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
    E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
    enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
f =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
φ₁,, p₁ = φ₂

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
φ₁: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p₁: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
φ₁ =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
φ₂: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p₂: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
φ₂ =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
φ₁,, p₁ = φ₂,, p₂

       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

       iy)

E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p₂: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
φ₂ =

· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)

    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
          E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
          enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
   ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
   (iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
   x0 =

   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx

       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))

       wy) · EG wx wy

· postcomp_arr E₃

       iy)

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
φ₁: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p₁: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
φ₁ =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
φ₂: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p₂: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
φ₂ =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
x0: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
isaprop
  (∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
   (iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
   x0 =
   precomp_arr E₂ y ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
φ₁: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p₁: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
φ₁ =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
φ₂: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p₂: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
φ₂ =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
x0: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
t, t0: C₁
t1: z_iso (F t) x
t2: z_iso (F t0) y
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t2 : z_iso (F t0) y,
    x0 =
    precomp_arr E₂ y t1
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F t) (inv_from_z_iso t2)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ t
           t0) · EG t t0
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G t0)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              t1))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y t2))
     t2)

          apply homset_property.
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
φ₁: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p₁: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
φ₁ =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
φ₂: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p₂: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
φ₂ =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
          x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
       iy)
pr1 (φ₁,, p₁) = pr1 (φ₂,, p₂)

        exact (p₁ wx wy ix iy @ !(p₂ wx wy ix iy)).
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
∑
f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
    E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
    enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
f =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
(λ f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
       enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
 ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
 (iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
 f =
 precomp_arr E₂ y ix
 · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
 · inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
 · EG wx wy
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
  ?pr1

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
 exact (postcomp_arr E₂ _ (inv_from_z_iso iy)
                 · precomp_arr E₂ _ ix
                 · inv_from_z_iso (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ _ _)
                 · EG wx wy
                 · postcomp_arr E₃ _ (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
                 · precomp_arr E₃ _ (inv_from_z_iso
                                       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))).
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
(λ f : V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
       E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
       enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧,
 ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
 (iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
 f =
 precomp_arr E₂ y ix
 · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
 · inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
 · EG wx wy
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
  (postcomp_arr E₂ x (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · precomp_arr E₂ (F wy) ix
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix)))
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
postcomp_arr E₂ x (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· precomp_arr E₂ (F wy) ix
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix'
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix'
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
identity (E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))) =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix'
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
precomp_arr E₂ y (identity x)
· (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))) =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix'
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix' · ix')
· (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))) =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix'
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
precomp_arr E₂ y ix'
· precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix')
· (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))) =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix'
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
precomp_arr E₂ y ix'
· (precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix')
   · (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
      · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
         · (inv_from_z_iso
              (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                 HF₂ wx wy)
            · (EG wx wy
               · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
                    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                       y iy)
                  · precomp_arr E₃
                      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                         y)
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                            x ix)))))))) =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix'
· (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx'
           wy')
      · (EG wx' wy'
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix'))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   y iy')))))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix')
· (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy)
         · (EG wx wy
            · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    y iy)
               · precomp_arr E₃
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                      y)
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                         x ix))))))) =
postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx'
        wy')
   · (EG wx' wy'
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix'))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                x)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                y iy'))))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix')
· precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
precomp_arr E₂ y (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx', y ⦄)
· (precomp_arr E₂ y (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))) =
postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (identity y)
· (precomp_arr E₂ y (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))) =
postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y

   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso

   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)

          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))) =
postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

iy': z_iso (F wy') y

· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') iy'
· (precomp_arr E₂ y (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
