G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') iy'
   · (precomp_arr E₂ y (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
      · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
         · (inv_from_z_iso
              (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                 HF₂ wx wy)
            · (EG wx wy
               · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
                    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                       y iy)
                  · precomp_arr E₃
                      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                         y)
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                            x ix)))))))) =
postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') (inv_from_z_iso iy')
· (inv_from_z_iso

   · (EG wx' wy'

                 x ix'))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                x)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                y iy'))))

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx') iy'
· (precomp_arr E₂ y (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy)
         · (EG wx wy
            · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso

· (EG wx' wy'

              ix'))
      · postcomp_arr E₃

x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y

· precomp_arr E₂ y (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso

· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)

· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =

· EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso

· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

wy: C₁

iy': z_iso (F wy') y
precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
· (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy'
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)

· (EG wx' wy'

      · postcomp_arr E₃

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
· (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy'
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy)
         · (EG wx wy
            · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    y iy)
               · precomp_arr E₃
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                      y)
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                         x ix))))))) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
?b =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· (EG wx' wy'
   · (precomp_arr E₃ 
        (G wy')
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix'))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy')))

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
· (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· (EG wx' wy'
   · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix'))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy')))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx', F wy' ⦄)
· (precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
             wx wy) · EG wx wy
      · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy)
      · precomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                x ix)))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· (EG wx' wy'
   · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix'))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy')))

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· EF wx' wy'
· (precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
             wx wy) · EG wx wy
      · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy)
      · precomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                x ix)))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· (EG wx' wy'
   · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix'))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy')))

C₁, C₂: category

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· (EF wx' wy'
   · (precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
      · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx)
           (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
         · (inv_from_z_iso
              (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                 HF₂ wx wy)
            · (EG wx wy
               · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
                    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                       y iy)
                  · precomp_arr E₃
                      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                         y)
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                            x ix)))))))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx' wy')
· (EG wx' wy'
   · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix'))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy')))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
EF wx' wy'
· (precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy)
         · (EG wx wy
            · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    y iy)
               · precomp_arr E₃
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                      y)
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                         x ix))))))) =
EG wx' wy'
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
           ix'))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy'))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
EF wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
EF wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃

wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
V: monoidal_cat

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
EF wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy

· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y

  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
# F jx = ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'

            apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (F_fully_faithful _ _))).
          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
EF wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix')
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)

       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
EF wx' wy' · precomp_arr E₂ (F wy') (# F jx)
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)

· precomp_arr E₃

· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

x, y: C₂
wx: C₁

  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx

· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy

    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx · EF wx wy'
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx · EF wx wy'
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
# F jy = iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy

            apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (F_fully_faithful _ _))).
          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx · EF wx wy'
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx · EF wx wy'
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (# F jy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx
· (EF wx wy'
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (# F jy)
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy)
         · (EG wx wy
            · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    y iy)
               · precomp_arr E₃
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                      y)
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                         x ix))))))) =
EG wx' wy'
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
           ix'))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy'))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx
· (EF wx wy'
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (# F jy)
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy)
         · (EG wx wy
            · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    y iy)
               · precomp_arr E₃
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                      y)
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                         x ix))))))) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
?b =
EG wx' wy'
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
           ix'))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy'))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx
· (EF wx wy'
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (# F jy)
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy)
         · (EG wx wy
            · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    y iy)
               · precomp_arr E₃
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                      y)
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                         x ix))))))) = ?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
EF wx wy'
· (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (# F jy)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy)
      · (EG wx wy
         · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy)
            · precomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   y)
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                      x ix)))))) = ?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
EF wx wy' · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (# F jy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx

  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
postcomp_arr E₁ wx jy · EF wx wy
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
postcomp_arr E₁ wx jy
· (EF wx wy
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy)
      · (EG wx wy
         · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy)
            · precomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   y)
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                      x ix)))))) = ?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
EF wx wy
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
   · (EG wx wy
      · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy)
         · precomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                y)
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   x ix))))) = ?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
EF wx wy
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
EF wx wy
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy) =
?y'

            apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ _ _)).
          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx
· (postcomp_arr E₁ wx jy
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ wx, wy ⦄) · EG wx wy
      · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy)
      · precomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                x ix)))) =
EG wx' wy'
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
           ix'))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy'))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx
· (postcomp_arr E₁ wx jy
   · (EG wx wy
      · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy)
      · precomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                x ix)))) =
EG wx' wy'
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
           ix'))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy'))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx
· (postcomp_arr E₁ wx jy
   · (EG wx wy
      · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy)
      · precomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                x ix)))) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
?b =
EG wx' wy'
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
           ix'))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy'))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx
· (postcomp_arr E₁ wx jy
   · (EG wx wy
      · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy)
      · precomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                x ix)))) = ?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
postcomp_arr E₁ wx jy
· (EG wx wy
   · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))) = ?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
postcomp_arr E₁ wx jy · EG wx wy
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
EG wx wy' · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx) (# G jy)
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
?t2

            apply idpath.
          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx
· (EG wx wy' · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx) (# G jy)
   · postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))) =
EG wx' wy'
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
           ix'))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy'))

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₁ wy' jx · EG wx wy'
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx) (# G jy)
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
EG wx' wy' · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy') (# G jx)
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx) (# G jy)
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
EG wx' wy'
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
EG wx' wy'
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy') (# G jx)
   · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx) (# G jy)
      · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy)
         · precomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                y)
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   x ix))))) =
EG wx' wy'
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
           ix'))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy'))

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₃ (G wy') (# G jx)
· (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx) (# G jy)
   · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
      · precomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                x ix)))) =
precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₃ (G wy') (# G jx)
· (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx) (# G jy)
   · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
      · precomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                x ix)))) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
?b =
precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₃ (G wy') (# G jx)
· (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx) (# G jy)
   · (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
      · precomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                x ix)))) = ?b

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx

  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx) (# G jy)
· (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))) = ?t2

C₃: univalent_category

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx

  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx) (# G jy)
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
postcomp_arr E₃ (G wx)
  (# G jy
   · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)) =
?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (# G jy
     · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy) =
?t2

            apply idpath.
          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₃ (G wy') (# G jx)
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (# G jy
        · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
            iy)) =
precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

wx: C₁

iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x

     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)
   · # G jx)
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (# G jy
     · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy) =
?b
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x
iy': z_iso (F wy') y
jx:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wx'))
  (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix'): C₁ ⟦ wx, wx' ⟧
px: ix · inv_from_z_iso ix' = # F jx
jy:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wy' wy))
  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
?b =
precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

wx', wy': C₁

  (iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wy', wy ⟧
py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
precomp_arr E₃ (G wy')
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)
   · # G jx)
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (# G jy
     · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy) =
?b

V: monoidal_cat

x, y: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wx', wy': C₁
ix': z_iso (F wx') x

py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy · iy = iy'

wx: C₁

wy: C₁

py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy
iy' · (inv_from_z_iso iy · iy) = iy'

py: iy' · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F jy

  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)
   · # G jx)
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix'))

    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy')

    Qed.

    Definition enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
      : functor_enrichment_data
          enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor
          E₂
          E₃
      := λ x y,
         pr11 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_iscontr x y).

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
wx, wy: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data x
  y =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

C₁, C₂: category

  y =

· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)

· postcomp_arr E₃

    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

      exact (pr21 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_iscontr x y) wx wy ix iy).
    Qed.

x, y: C₂
f: V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄,
E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x,
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),
f =
precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
       wy) · EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)

       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
          ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

  y = f

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ (wx wy : C₁) (ix : z_iso (F wx) x)
(iy : z_iso (F wy) y),

precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso

       wy) · EG wx wy

          ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃

    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data x
  y = f

      exact (!(maponpaths
                 pr1
                 (pr2 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_iscontr x y) (f ,, p)))).
    Qed.

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x
enriched_id E₁ w
· (EF w w
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ w w)
      · (EG w w
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G w)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x i))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   x i))))) =
enriched_id E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x)

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x
enriched_id E₁ w
· (EF w w
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ w w)
      · (EG w w
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G w)

                    x i))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   x i))))) = ?b

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x
?b =
enriched_id E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x)

G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x
EF w w
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ w w)
   · (EG w w
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G w)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x i))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                x)

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x
EF w w
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ w w)
· EG w w
· precomp_arr E₃ (G w)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x i))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x i) =
?t2

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x
EF w w
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ w w) =
?y'

          exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ w w)).
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x
enriched_id E₁ w
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ w, w ⦄) · EG w w
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G w)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             i))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x i)) =
enriched_id E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x)

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x

· (EG w w
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G w)

   · postcomp_arr E₃

HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x
enriched_id E₁ w · EG w w
· precomp_arr E₃ (G w)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x i))
· postcomp_arr E₃

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x
enriched_id E₃ (G w)
· precomp_arr E₃ (G w)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x i))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

x: C₂
w: C₁

     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x i))

x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x

  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x i)

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x
enriched_from_arr E₃
  (identity
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)) =

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x: C₂
w: C₁
i: z_iso (F w) x
enriched_id E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) =
enriched_id E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x)

        apply idpath.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
∏ x y z : C₂,
enriched_comp E₂ x y z
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
    x z =
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data y
  z
#⊗ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
     x y
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor z)

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
enriched_comp E₂ x y z
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
    x z =
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data y

#⊗ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
     x y
· enriched_comp E₃

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
H: ∃ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) x
enriched_comp E₂ x y z
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
    x z =
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data y
  z
#⊗ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
     x y
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
(∃ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) x)
→ enriched_comp E₂ x y z
  · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
      x z =
  enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
    y z
  #⊗ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
       x y
  · enriched_comp E₃
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
(∃ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) y)
→ enriched_comp E₂ x y z
  · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
      x z =
  enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
    y z
  #⊗ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
       x y
  · enriched_comp E₃
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: ∑ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) z
enriched_comp E₂ x y z
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
    x z =
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data y
