V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ x y z
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
    x z =
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data y
  z
#⊗ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
     x y
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ x y z
· (precomp_arr E₂ z ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data y
  z
#⊗ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
     x y
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ x y z
· (precomp_arr E₂ z ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data y
  z
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy) · EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ x y z
· (precomp_arr E₂ z ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
(precomp_arr E₂ z iy
 · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
 · inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
 · EG wy wz
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy) · EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ x y z
· (precomp_arr E₂ z ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
?b
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
?b =
(precomp_arr E₂ z iy
 · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
 · inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
 · EG wy wz
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy) · EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ 
        (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ x y z
· (precomp_arr E₂ z ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ x y z · precomp_arr E₂ z ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y z
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y z
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wz)
         · (EG wx wz
            · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                       x ix))
               · postcomp_arr E₃
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                      x)
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                      z iz)))))) = ?b

C₁, C₂: category

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y z
· (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)

                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) = ?t2

wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y z
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
?t2

            apply idpath.

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

wz: C₁

· (postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
   · inv_from_z_iso

          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
?b

x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z

#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
(precomp_arr E₂ z iy
 · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
 · inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
 · EG wy wz
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy) · EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· ((precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· ((precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
postcomp_arr E₂ y (identity z)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· ((precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
postcomp_arr E₂ y (identity z)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y (identity x)
· ((precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz · iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y (identity x)
· ((precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz · iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix · ix)
· ((precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
(postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
 · postcomp_arr E₂ y iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix · ix)
· ((precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
(postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
 · postcomp_arr E₂ y iz)
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
    · precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix))
· ((precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ y iz
  #⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix)
· ((precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) =
postcomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· (postcomp_arr E₂ y iz
   #⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix)
   · ((precomp_arr E₂ z iy
       · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
          · (inv_from_z_iso
               (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                  HF₂ wy wz)
             · (EG wy wz
                · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
                     (inv_from_z_iso
                        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                           y iy))
                   · postcomp_arr E₃
                       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                          y)
                       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                          z iz))))))
      #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
          · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx)
               (inv_from_z_iso iy)
             · (inv_from_z_iso
                  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                     HF₂ wx wy)
                · (EG wx wy
                   · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                              x ix))
                      · postcomp_arr E₃
                          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                             x)
                          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                             y iy))))))
      · enriched_comp E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
   · (EG wx wz
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                x)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                z iz)))) =
postcomp_arr E₂ y iz
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix)
· ((precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
       · (inv_from_z_iso
            (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
               wy wz)
          · (EG wy wz
             · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
                  (inv_from_z_iso
                     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                        y iy))
                · postcomp_arr E₃
                    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                       y)
                    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                       z iz))))))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
          · (inv_from_z_iso
               (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                  HF₂ wx wy)
             · (EG wx wy
                · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
                     (inv_from_z_iso
                        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                           x ix))
                   · postcomp_arr E₃
                       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                          x)
                       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                          y iy))))))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
postcomp_arr E₂ y iz
#⊗ precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix)
· (precomp_arr E₂ z iy
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
          wz) · EG wy wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
  #⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
      · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
             wx wy) · EG wx wy
      · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                x ix))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
(postcomp_arr E₂ y iz
 · (precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix)
    · (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy)))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(postcomp_arr E₂ y iz
 · (precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix)
    · (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy)))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)

x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z

 · (precomp_arr E₂ z iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy
           wz) · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)

           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix)
    · (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy)))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) = 
?b

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category

wz: C₁

· postcomp_arr E₃

    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)

HF₁: essentially_surjective F

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z

· (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) iz
   · (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wy) (inv_from_z_iso iz)
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wy wz)
         · (EG wy wz
            · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                       y iy))
               · postcomp_arr E₃
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                      y)
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                      z iz)))))) = ?y'0

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
 · (inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
    · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₂ y (inv_from_z_iso ix)
    · (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
       · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wy) · EG wx wy
       · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))) = ?y'

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
 · (inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
    · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)))
#⊗ (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy) · EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)

wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z

 · (inv_from_z_iso

    · postcomp_arr E₃

· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
?b =
enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
 · (inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
    · EG wy wz
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)))
#⊗ (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy) · EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) = 
?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
 · (inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
    · (EG wy wz
       · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  y iy))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 y)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 z iz)))))
#⊗ (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
    · (inv_from_z_iso
         (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
            wy)
       · (EG wx wy
          · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
               (inv_from_z_iso
                  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                     x ix))
             · postcomp_arr E₃
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                    x)
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    y iy)))))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) = 
?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
   · (EG wy wz
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                y)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                z iz))))
  #⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy)
      · (EG wx wy
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   y iy))))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) = 
?b

          apply idpath.
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
   · (EG wy wz
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                y)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                z iz))))
  #⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy)
      · (EG wx wy
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   y iy))))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
   · (EG wy wz
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                y)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                z iz))))
  #⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy)
      · (EG wx wy
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   y iy))))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, F wz ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F wx, y ⦄))
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
   · (EG wy wz
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                y)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                z iz))))
  #⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy)
      · (EG wx wy
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   y iy))))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y, F wz ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ y, F wz ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
   · (EG wy wz
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                y)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                z iz))))
  #⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy)
      · (EG wx wy
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   y iy))))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ y, F wz ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
?b

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
?b =
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
   · (EG wy wz
      · (precomp_arr E₃ 
           (G wz)

         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                y)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                z iz))))
  #⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy)
      · (EG wx wy
         · (precomp_arr E₃ 
              (G wy)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                  x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  y iy))))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
?b = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ y, F wz ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, y ⦄) =
?b

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ y, F wz ⦄) = ?y'0

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (identity y) = ?y'0

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy · iy) = ?y'0

            
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
· precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy) = ?y'0

            apply idpath.
          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
 · precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy))
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, y ⦄) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
 · precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy))
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (identity y) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
