  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
 · precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy))
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy · iy) =
?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
 · precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy))
#⊗ (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
  #⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy = ?y'

          apply idpath.
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
  #⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
   · (EG wy wz
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                y)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                z iz))))
  #⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy)
      · (EG wx wy
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   y iy))))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· (precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   #⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
   · (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wz)
         · (EG wx wz
            · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                       x ix))
               · postcomp_arr E₃
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                      x)
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                      z iz)))))) =
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) iy
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· ((inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
    · (EG wy wz
       · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  y iy))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 y)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 z iz))))
   #⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
         (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
            wy)
       · (EG wx wy
          · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
               (inv_from_z_iso
                  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                     x ix))
             · postcomp_arr E₃
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                    x)
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    y iy))))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) =
(inv_from_z_iso
   (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
 · (EG wy wz
    · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               y iy))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
              iz))))
#⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
    · (EG wx wy
       · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  x ix))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 x)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy))))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
?b =
(inv_from_z_iso
   (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
 · (EG wy wz
    · (precomp_arr E₃ 
         (G wz)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               y iy))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
              iz))))
#⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
    · (EG wx wy
       · (precomp_arr E₃ 
            (G wy)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  x ix))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 x)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy))))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) = ?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
· precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
· (precomp_arr E₂ (F wz) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) y (F wz)) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄)
   #⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄)
  #⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄)
#⊗ (postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) iy
    · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy))
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (iy · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (identity (F wy))
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, F wy ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz) = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity ((E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F wx, F wy ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz) = ?y'

          apply id_left.
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
(inv_from_z_iso
   (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
 · (EG wy wz
    · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               y iy))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
              iz))))
#⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
    · (EG wx wy
       · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  x ix))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 x)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy))))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· (EG wy wz
   · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
             iz)))
  #⊗ (EG wx wy
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                x)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                y iy)))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity ((E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F wx, F wy ⦄))
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wz) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· (EG wy wz
   · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
             iz)))
  #⊗ (EG wx wy
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                x)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                y iy)))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity ((E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F wx, F wy ⦄))
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· ((EG wy wz
    · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               y iy))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
              iz)))
   #⊗ (EG wx wy
       · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  x ix))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 x)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy)))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₂ ⦃ F wy, F wz ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, F wy ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· ((EG wy wz
    · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               y iy))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
              iz)))
   #⊗ (EG wx wy
       · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  x ix))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 x)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy)))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(inv_from_z_iso
   (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
 · fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F wx, F wy ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· ((EG wy wz
    · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               y iy))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
              iz)))
   #⊗ (EG wx wy
       · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  x ix))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 x)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy)))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(inv_from_z_iso
   (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
 · fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
    · fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· ((EG wy wz
    · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               y iy))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
              iz)))
   #⊗ (EG wx wy
       · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  x ix))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 x)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy)))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
(inv_from_z_iso
   (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
 · EF wy wz)
#⊗ (inv_from_z_iso
      (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
    · EF wx wy)
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· ((EG wy wz
    · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               y iy))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
              iz)))
   #⊗ (EG wx wy
       · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  x ix))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 x)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy)))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EF wy wz #⊗ EF wx wy
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· ((EG wy wz
    · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               y iy))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
              iz)))
   #⊗ (EG wx wy
       · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  x ix))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 x)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy)))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· (EF wy wz #⊗ EF wx wy
   · (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂
              wx wz)
         · (EG wx wz
            · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                       x ix))
               · postcomp_arr E₃
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                      x)
                   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                      z iz)))))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wy wz)
#⊗ inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· ((EG wy wz
    · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               y iy))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
              iz)))
   #⊗ (EG wx wy
       · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                  x ix))
          · postcomp_arr E₃
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                 x)
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 y iy)))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
EF wy wz #⊗ EF wx wy
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wz)
      · (EG wx wz
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   z iz))))) =
(EG wy wz
 · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
            iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)))
#⊗ (EG wx wy
    · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy)))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
EF wy wz #⊗ EF wx wy
· enriched_comp E₂ (F wx) (F wy) (F wz)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
(EG wy wz
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₁ wx wy wz · EF wx wz
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
(EG wy wz
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₁ wx wy wz · EF wx wz
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
?b
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF

ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
?b =
(EG wy wz
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃

              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
EF wx wz
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
   · (EG wx wz
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                x)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                z iz)))) = ?t2

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
EF wx wz
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)
· EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
?t2

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
EF wx wz
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz) =
?y'

          apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                   (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wz)).
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₁ wx wy wz
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ wx, wz ⦄) · EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
(EG wy wz
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₁ wx wy wz
· (EG wx wz
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
(EG wy wz
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₁ wx wy wz · EG wx wz
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
(EG wy wz
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
EG wy wz #⊗ EG wx wy
· enriched_comp E₃ (G wx) (G wy) (G wz)
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
(EG wy wz
 · precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (EG wx wy
    · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
EG wy wz #⊗ EG wx wy
· (enriched_comp E₃ (G wx) (G wy) (G wz)
   · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
             iz))) =
(EG wy wz
 · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
            iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)))
#⊗ (EG wx wy
    · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy)))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
EG wy wz #⊗ EG wx wy
· (enriched_comp E₃ (G wx) (G wy) (G wz)
   · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
             iz))) =
EG wy wz #⊗ EG wx wy
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
  #⊗ (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
EG wy wz #⊗ EG wx wy
· (enriched_comp E₃ (G wx) (G wy) (G wz)
   · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
              ix))
      · postcomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z
             iz))) =
EG wy wz #⊗ EG wx wy
· ((precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
            iy))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
               x ix))
       · postcomp_arr E₃
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₃ (G wx) (G wy) (G wz)
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
(precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
   (inv_from_z_iso
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
            ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
enriched_comp E₃ (G wx) (G wy) (G wz)
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
(precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
   (inv_from_z_iso
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
            ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₃ ⦃ G wy, G wz ⦄)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
    (G wz)
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
(precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
   (inv_from_z_iso
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
            ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₃ ⦃ G wy, G wz ⦄)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· (enriched_comp E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
     (G wy) (G wz)
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)) =
(precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
   (inv_from_z_iso
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
            ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity (E₃ ⦃ G wy, G wz ⦄)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· (postcomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)
   #⊗ identity
        (E₃
         ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x,
         G wy ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (G wy)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)) =
(precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
   (inv_from_z_iso
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
            ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z

#⊗ precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G wy)

  #⊗ identity

· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
(precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
   (inv_from_z_iso
      (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz))
#⊗ (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
            ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
postcomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
(precomp_arr E₃ (G wz)
   (inv_from_z_iso

 · postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)

      (inv_from_z_iso

            ix))
    · postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· enriched_comp E₃

wz: C₁

postcomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)
#⊗ precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category

wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
?b =
postcomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz)

     (inv_from_z_iso

· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) 
    (G wy) (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z

     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso z iz) =
?y'

          apply precomp_postcomp_arr.

wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity

   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· precomp_arr E₃

· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
enriched_comp E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity
  (E₃ ⦃ G wy,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· (precomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))
   #⊗ identity
        (E₃
         ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x,
         enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob y)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)) =
enriched_comp E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category

x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity
  (E₃ ⦃ G wy,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)
· (identity
     (E₃ ⦃ G wy,
      enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z ⦄)
   #⊗ postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
              iy))
   · enriched_comp E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (G wy)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)) =
enriched_comp E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity
  (E₃ ⦃ G wy,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y
             iy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
enriched_comp E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity
  (E₃ ⦃ G wy,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
     (identity (G wy))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
enriched_comp E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity
  (E₃ ⦃ G wy,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z ⦄)
#⊗ identity
     (E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x,
      G wy ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
enriched_comp E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y, z: C₂
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
wz: C₁
iz: z_iso (F wz) z
identity
  ((E₃ ⦃ G wy,
    enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x,
      G wy ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z) =
enriched_comp E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x) (G wy)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob z)

        apply id_left.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
∏ (x y : C₂) (f : C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_from_arr E₃
  (# enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor f) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ f
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
    x y

iy: z_iso (F wy) y
enriched_from_arr E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ f
· (precomp_arr E₂ y ix
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
          wy) · EG wx wy
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
enriched_from_arr E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ f · precomp_arr E₂ y ix
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
enriched_from_arr E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (ix · f)
· postcomp_arr E₂ (F wx) (inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
enriched_from_arr E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso

· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j

  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧

· inv_from_z_iso

· EG wx wy

· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

          apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (F_fully_faithful _ _))).

wy: C₁

HF₁: essentially_surjective F

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧

· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

wy: C₁

  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧

wy: C₁

wy: C₁

  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧

· inv_from_z_iso

· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)

· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)

?b

  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧

?b =

  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f)

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
enriched_from_arr E₁ j
· (EF wx wy
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx
           wy)
      · (EG wx wy
         · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                    x ix))
            · postcomp_arr E₃
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                   x)
                (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                   y iy))))) = ?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
EF wx wy
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
   · (EG wx wy
      · (precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                 x ix))
         · postcomp_arr E₃
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
                x)
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
                y iy)))) = ?t2

C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
