EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
EF wx wy
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy)
· EG wx wy
· precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy) =
?t2

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
EF wx wy
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ wx wy) =
?y'

          apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ _ _)).
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
enriched_from_arr E₁ j
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ wx, wy ⦄) · EG wx wy
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x
             ix))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso y iy)) =
enriched_from_arr E₃
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f)

· (EG wx wy
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G wy)

   · postcomp_arr E₃

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
# F j · iy = ix · f

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy · iy = ix · f

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
ix · (f · (inv_from_z_iso iy · iy)) = ix · f

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
ix · (f · identity y) = ix · f

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
ix · f = ix · f

          apply idpath.

inv_from_z_iso
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)
· (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix
   · enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f) =
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f

x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
inv_from_z_iso
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix)
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso x ix
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f =
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
wx: C₁
ix: z_iso (F wx) x
wy: C₁
iy: z_iso (F wy) y
j:= invmap (make_weq # F (F_fully_faithful wx wy))
  (ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy): C₁ ⟦ wx, wy ⟧
q: ix · f · inv_from_z_iso iy = # F j
identity (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob x)
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f =
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor f

        apply id_left.
    Qed.

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
functor_enrichment
  enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor E₂ E₃

(λ FE : functor_enrichment_data

 is_functor_enrichment FE)

(λ FE : functor_enrichment_data
          enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor E₂ E₃,
 is_functor_enrichment FE)
  enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
 exact enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_laws.
    Defined.

    Definition enriched_rezk_completion_ump_enriched_functor
      : enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
      := enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor
         ,,
         enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment.

    (** * 4. The commutativity *)
    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
is_nat_trans G
  (F ∙ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor)
  (λ x : C₁,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
     (identity_z_iso (F x)))

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
is_nat_trans G
  (F ∙ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor)
  (λ x : C₁,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
     (identity_z_iso (F x)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# G f
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
    (identity_z_iso (F y)) =
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
  (identity_z_iso (F x))
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor (# F f)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
  (identity_z_iso (F x))
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_mor (# F f) =
# G f
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
    (identity_z_iso (F y))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f · identity_z_iso (F y) =
identity_z_iso (F x) · # F f

# F f = # F f

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
c: C₁
is_z_isomorphism (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm c)

        apply z_iso_is_z_isomorphism.
    Defined.

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
nat_trans_enrichment
  enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment)

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
nat_trans_enrichment
  enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
∏ x y : C₁,
functor_comp_enrichment EF
  enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment x y
· precomp_arr E₃
    ((F ∙ enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor) y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso x) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso y)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment_data
    (F x) (F y)
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F y))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
       (identity_z_iso (F x))) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· (precomp_arr E₂ (F y) (identity (F x))
   · postcomp_arr E₂ (F x) (identity (F y))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ x y)
   · EG x y
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
             (F x) (identity_z_iso (F x))))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F x))
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
          (identity_z_iso (F y))))
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F y))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
       (identity_z_iso (F x))) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ x y)
   · EG x y
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
             (F x) (identity_z_iso (F x))))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F x))
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
          (identity_z_iso (F y))))
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F y))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
       (identity_z_iso (F x))) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ x y)
   · EG x y
   · precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
             (F x) (identity_z_iso (F x))))
   · postcomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F x))
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
          (identity_z_iso (F y))))
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F y))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
       (identity_z_iso (F x))) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ x y)
· EG x y
· precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
          (identity_z_iso (F x))))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F x))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F y))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
       (identity_z_iso (F x))) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ x y)
· EG x y
· precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
          (identity_z_iso (F x))))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F x))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F y))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
       (identity_z_iso (F x))) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
?b =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso 
       (F y) (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ x y)
· EG x y
· precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
          (identity_z_iso (F x))))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F x))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F y))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
       (identity_z_iso (F x))) = ?b

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ x y) =
?y'

        exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                 (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HF₂ x y)).
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) · EG x y
· precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
          (identity_z_iso (F x))))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F x))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F y))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
       (identity_z_iso (F x))) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
EG x y
· precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
          (identity_z_iso (F x))))
· postcomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F x))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))
· precomp_arr E₃
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F y))
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
       (identity_z_iso (F x))) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
EG x y
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
           (F x) (identity_z_iso (F x))))
   · (postcomp_arr E₃
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F x))
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
           (F y) (identity_z_iso (F y)))
      · precomp_arr E₃
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob
             (F y))
          (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso
             (F x) (identity_z_iso (F x))))) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
        (identity_z_iso (F x))))
· (postcomp_arr E₃
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F x))
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
        (identity_z_iso (F y)))
   · precomp_arr E₃
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_ob (F y))
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
          (identity_z_iso (F x)))) =
postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
     (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
        (identity_z_iso (F x))))
· (precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
        (identity_z_iso (F x)))
   · postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
          (identity_z_iso (F y)))) =
postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
     (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
        (identity_z_iso (F x))))
· precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
       (identity_z_iso (F x)))
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y))) =
postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
     (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
precomp_arr E₃ (G y)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
     (identity_z_iso (F x))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F x)
          (identity_z_iso (F x))))
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y))) =
postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
     (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
precomp_arr E₃ (G y) (identity (G x))
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y))) =
postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
     (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
x, y: C₁
identity (E₃ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
       (identity_z_iso (F y))) =
postcomp_arr E₃ (G x)
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_iso (F y)
     (identity_z_iso (F y)))

      apply id_left.
    Qed.

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment)
  EG

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment)
  EG

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: C₁ ⟶ C₃
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₃
nat_trans_enrichment
  enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment)

      apply enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_enrichment.
    Qed.
  End EssentiallySurjective.

  (** * 5. Essential surjectivity *)
  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
essentially_surjective (enriched_precomp E₃ EF)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
essentially_surjective (enriched_precomp E₃ EF)

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
∃ a : enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃,
z_iso (enriched_precomp E₃ EF a) G

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category

HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
z_iso
  (enriched_precomp E₃ EF
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_enriched_functor
        (pr2 G))) G

⟦ enriched_precomp E₃ EF
    (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_enriched_functor
       (pr2 G)), G ⟧

C₁, C₂: category

  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F

functor_composite_data F
  enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_data ⟹ pr1 G
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
nat_trans_enrichment 
  (pr1 ?Goal)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment
        (pr2 G))) (pr2 G)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
functor_composite_data F
  enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_data ⟹ pr1 G
 exact (nat_z_iso_inv enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso).
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
nat_trans_enrichment
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_functor_enrichment
        (pr2 G))) (pr2 G)
 exact (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_inv_enrichment _).
    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃ ⟦ G,
enriched_precomp E₃ EF
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_enriched_functor
     (pr2 G)) ⟧
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
Core.mor_disp (pr2 G)
  (pr2
     (enriched_precomp E₃ EF
        (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_enriched_functor
           (pr2 G))))
  enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm

      exact (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_enrichment _).
    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
is_inverse_in_precat
  ((nat_z_iso_inv
      enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso
    :
    FunctorCategory.functor_category C₁ C₃
    ⟦ pr1
        (enriched_precomp E₃ EF
           (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_enriched_functor
              (pr2 G))), pr1 G ⟧),,
   (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_inv_enrichment
      (pr2 G)
    :
    (λ f : FunctorCategory.functor_category C₁ C₃
           ⟦ pr1
               (enriched_precomp E₃ EF
                  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_enriched_functor
                     (pr2 G))), pr1 G ⟧,
     Core.mor_disp
       (pr2
          (enriched_precomp E₃ EF
             (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_enriched_functor
                (pr2 G)))) (pr2 G) f)
      (nat_z_iso_inv
         enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso
       :
       FunctorCategory.functor_category C₁ C₃
       ⟦ pr1
           (enriched_precomp E₃ EF
              (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_enriched_functor
                 (pr2 G))), pr1 G ⟧)))
  (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm,,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_enrichment
     (pr2 G))
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
(nat_z_iso_inv enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso,,
 enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_inv_enrichment
   (pr2 G))
· (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm,,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_enrichment
     (pr2 G)) =
identity
  (enriched_precomp E₃ EF
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_enriched_functor
        (pr2 G)))
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
(enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm,,
 enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_enrichment (pr2 G))
· (nat_z_iso_inv
     enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso,,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_inv_enrichment
     (pr2 G)) = identity G

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
(nat_z_iso_inv enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso,,
 enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_inv_enrichment
   (pr2 G))
· (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm,,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_enrichment
     (pr2 G)) =
identity
  (enriched_precomp E₃ EF
     (enriched_rezk_completion_ump_enriched_functor
        (pr2 G)))
 abstract
          (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_nat_trans_enrichment | ] ;
           use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
           intro x ; cbn ;
           apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv).
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor EF
F_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  EF HF₂: fully_faithful F
G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
(enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm,,
 enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_enrichment (pr2 G))
· (nat_z_iso_inv
     enriched_rezk_completion_ump_nat_z_iso,,
   enriched_rezk_completion_ump_comm_inv_enrichment
     (pr2 G)) = identity G
 abstract
          (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_nat_trans_enrichment | ] ;
           use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
           intro x ; cbn ;
           apply z_iso_inv_after_z_iso).
  Defined.
End PreCompEssentiallySurjective.
